title: BOLSIUS Rustic Shimmer Metallic Candle 130MM x 68MM Christmas Dinner Table Setting Xmas Festive Pillar Candles (Champagne)
features: Long-Lasting Burn: Enjoy a large flame and soft light for extended hours with these renewed rustic pillar candles
Natural Aesthetic: Inspired by nature, these candles feature a rustic shimmer metallic style in a champagne color
Versatile Decor: Perfect for any occasion, these candles add a touch of elegance to your home, especially during the holidays
Easy to Use: With a cotton wick and a round shape, these candles are simple to light and fit perfectly in any candle holder
description: Product description About Bolsius Pillar Candles This new rustic candle range from Bolsius is inspired by the colors and textures of nature. Free from palm oil or animal fat, they’re made with a plant based wax and a cotton wick. On top of that, these new renewed rustic candles now burns even longer. With a large flame and soft light, these Bolsius Rustic Pillar Candles bring atmosphere to any environment. Size: 13cm x 6.8cm Fragrance: Unscented Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials, do not leave unattended, monitor burn time, and properly dispose of remnants.
